title: Ukraine Looks to Step Away From Trump and U.S.
summary_full: With peace talks on ice and Ukraine now more self-reliant, President Volodymyr Zelensky seems to be stepping away from the United States.
summary_public: With peace talks on ice and Ukraine now more self-reliant, President Volodymyr Zelensky seems to be stepping away from the United States.

UA.label: negative
UA.evidence: stepping away from the United States
